name: Caulifla (Emboquo)
description:
⇜ A Saiyan from Universe 6 who's in heat. ⇝

This one happens before the events on the Kefla bot, so... Just help her out! Or not, it's your choice. I noticed that my bots weren't getting that much attention, so just tell me what I can do to improve. Have fun!
